fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Set the parent of Instance (Slot) to NewParent (Slot)
fields.Instance: The slot to set the parent of.
fields.NewParent: The slot to set the parent of Instance (Slot) to.
fields.PreserveGlobalPosition: Whether or not to keep the values for Instance (Slot)'s local transforms or to keep it in the same place visually.
fields.Next: Sends an impulse when Instance (Slot) is sucessfully parented to NewParent (Slot), or if NewParent (Slot) is null it will set it to the Root Slot of the World.
